# open-inventor-source-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | open-inventor |
| Type | source-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding the public Open Inventor source release and documenting compatibility assumptions from README.FIRST.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public Open Inventor source release at the recorded open-inventor-master-head commit
- host platform and compiler assumptions taken from the public README.FIRST release notes
- public/open OpenGL scene-graph dependencies only
- public-safe scene graph or example input
- local build transcript and compatibility notes captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public Open Inventor source release listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the open-inventor-master-head snapshot record
- use README.FIRST to identify source tree layout, platform assumptions, and build constraints
- prepare a clean compatibility environment for the documented source release
- compile the Open Inventor libraries and public examples where available
- run a minimal public-safe scene graph load or example smoke test when the build succeeds
- record build commands, compatibility patches, diagnostics, outputs, and scene-graph test notes as public metadata

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- README.FIRST build-assumption summary
- compiler transcript
- library and example inventory
- compatibility patch notes
- public-safe smoke-test notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- open-inventor-source-release
- open-inventor-readme-first-build-notes
- coin3d-open-inventor-api-compatibility
